description: An auditor reviews the treasury department's controls over cash management and investments.

nodes.task_description: Review the company's investment policy to understand the types of investments that are permitted.

expected_outcome.expected: The auditor understands the rules for investing company cash.

nodes.task_description: Obtain a list of all current investments and verify they are compliant with the policy.

expected_outcome.expected: The auditor confirms all investments are of the permitted type and credit rating.

nodes.task_description: Test the controls over wire transfers, verifying that all large transfers require dual approval from two different managers.

expected_outcome.expected: The auditor tests a sample of wire transfers and confirms all had the required dual approvals.
